name: registration-form-01
title: Registration Form 01
author: ilinxa
description: Email + password registration form with optional second-step profile fields, ToS-consent gate, OAuth row above, password-strength meter, magic-link variant, and an off-screen honeypot. Hand-rolled on RHF v7 + zod v4 — does not depend on @ilinxa/json-form. Discriminated submit payload forces consumers to switch on stepCompleted so naïve destructuring never sends undefined profile fields to backend APIs.
